equity.label: S&P 500 equity signal
equity.note: A 5-session drawdown adds pressure. A 5-session rally adds relief and can partially offset the composite score.

rates.label: 2Y Treasury rate pressure
rates.note: Rates pressure reflects both the current 2Y level and any fresh 5-session rise.

inflation.label: Inflation expectations pressure
inflation.note: Inflation pressure reflects both the breakeven level and any fresh 5-session rise.

volatility.label: VIX volatility pressure
volatility.note: Higher implied volatility usually means greater market stress.

title: 2026-06-16 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 11.54
description: Today’s retreat-pressure snapshot for 2026-06-16: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 11.54/100, signaling a low pressure regime as front-end rate pressure and inflation expectations shaped the daily read. A positive 5-session S&P move also added equity relief. Explore the score history, daily post, and the four-factor dashboard.
hero_summary: This custom framework combines equities, front-end rates, inflation expectations, and volatility into one daily score. On 2026-06-16, the score printed 11.54/100 in the low regime, with front-end rate pressure and inflation expectations doing most of the work. Equities also provided visible relief through a positive 5-session move.
